contenuto:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 500" width="100%" height="100%">
  <rect width="800" height="500" fill="#03050d"/>
  <!-- Stelle -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="80" r="1" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="1.5" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="60" r="1" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="480" cy="110" r="2" fill="#d0e1f9" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="620" cy="70" r="1" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="730" cy="150" r="1.5" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="200" r="1" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="550" cy="190" r="1.2" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="400" cy="160" r="1.5" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="280" cy="220" r="1" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.4"/>
  <!-- Costellazione schematica -->
  <polyline points="480,110 510,130 530,115 550,140" fill="none" stroke="#4f6d91" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.4"/>
  <!-- Profilo Montagna -->
  <polygon points="-50,520 180,330 380,360 520,290 850,520" fill="#080a14"/>
  <polygon points="180,330 250,380 320,355 380,360 290,410" fill="#1a233a" opacity="0.5"/>
  <polygon points="520,290 600,360 680,340 850,520 480,450" fill="#121828" opacity="0.6"/>
  <!-- Luce del Rifugio sul Crinale -->
  <circle cx="180" cy="330" r="12" fill="#e0a855" opacity="0.15"/>
  <circle cx="180" cy="330" r="6" fill="#e0a855" opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="180" cy="330" r="2" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9"/>
</svg>
